appendix.title: Acknowledgments
appendix.para: (This appendix does not form an integral part of this document and is informational.)

section.title: Leadership
section.para: The following individuals have had significant leadership positions during the development of this document, not just this version of the document, and they are gratefully acknowledged:

listitem.para: Dr. Lucía Morado Vázquez, University of Geneva

section.title: Special Thanks
section.para: The following individuals have made substantial contributions to this document, not just this version of the document, and their contributions are gratefully acknowledged:

section.title: Participants
section.para: The following individuals were members of this committee during the creation of this document, not just this version of the document, and their contributions are gratefully acknowledged:

para.emphasis: < Placeholder: full list of individuals who were members of the OASIS XLIFF TC during the creation of this document. >
